'''Gateway Space Station''' was a facility [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] [[Tshindral III]]. The [[Space station/Legends|space station]] was at one time an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] Transfer Post, supplying [[Starship/Legends|starships]] on their way into the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]; though it was never completed. [[Talandro Starlyte]] eventually purchased the station and renamed it '''Starlyte Station'''.<ref name="WHoS&V" />
